title: FCI Food Expo
subtitle: India's Premier Food & Beverage Trade Exhibition
description: A comprehensive B2B trade exhibition covering Food, Beverage, Dairy, Bakery, Sea Food, Cold Storage, Packaging and all allied sectors. Meet manufacturers, suppliers, buyers and distributors under one roof.

title: FCI Power Expo
subtitle: Power, Energy & Solar Trade Exhibition
description: Covering Electrical, Solar, LED, Energy Storage and all allied sectors. A platform for India's energy transition — connecting manufacturers, installers, distributors and policymakers.

title: FCI Auto Expo
subtitle: Automotive & EV Components Exhibition
description: Automotive, Components, EV, Batteries, Aftermarket Solutions and allied sectors. South India's focused B2B automotive show connecting the entire vehicle ecosystem.

title: FCI Health Expo
subtitle: Healthcare, Medical & Pharma Trade Show
description: Connecting India's healthcare ecosystem — hospitals, medical device manufacturers, pharma companies and innovators — for better healthcare outcomes and business growth.

title: FCI Build Expo
subtitle: Construction & Infrastructure Trade Exhibition
description: Construction, Infrastructure, Smart Building & Security Solutions, Building Materials, Paint and all allied sectors. The go-to platform for India's built environment industry.
